channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds free character updates Classic Sonic, Axel, and Amigo announced
item.content:encoded:
SEGA has announced new playable characters coming to Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds from today until September, including Classic Sonic from Sonic the Hedgehog, Axel from the Crazy Taxi series, and Amigo from the Samba de Amgio series.

The full list of upcoming free content is as follows:

  • Classic Sonic (June 23, 2026)
    • Classic Sonic from Sonic the Hedgehog as a playable character
    • Exclusive vehicle
  • Axel (August 2026)
    • Axel from the Crazy Taxi series as a playable character
    • Exclusive vehicle
  • Amigo (September 2026)
    • Amigo from the Samba de Amgio series as a playable character
    • Exclusive vehicle

Nine new songs are also coming to the in-game jukebox, including:

  • “Looting the Louvre” by Naofumi Hataya (from Rhythm Thief & the Emperor’s Treasure)
  • “Theme of Phantom R” by Tomoya Ohtani (from Rhythm Thief & the Emperor’s Treasure)
  • “Akadoko” by Naofumi Hataya (from Akadoko & Kimishine Ai no Densetsu CD)
  • “Orpheus in the Underworld” by Naofumi Hataya (from Akadoko & Kimishine Ai no Densetsu CD)
  • “Kimishine” by Naofumi Hataya (from Akadoko & Kimishine Ai no Densetsu CD)
  • “Speed Is My Life” by Jun Senoue and Nathan Sharp (from the Sonic the Hedgehog 35th anniversary)
  • “space channel 5: getting the truth” by Kenichi Tokoi (from Space Channel 5)
  • “Go! Go! Cheerleader!” by SEGA Sound Team (from Space Channel 5)
  • “Burning Hearts” by Naofumi Hataya and Takenobu Mitsuyoshi (from Burning Rangers)

Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch a new trailer below.

New Free Characters Update #3

English



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/sonic-racing-crossworlds-free-character-updates-classic-sonic-axel-and-amigo-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition now available for Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Includes the base game and all existing updates.

SEGA has released Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition for Switch 2 for $49.99. It is available digitally, as well as physically as a game-key card.

Sonic Frontiers first launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam on November 8, 2022, achieving lifetime sales of at least 4.94 million units. It received various post-launch content in the form of free updates.

Here is an overview of the Definitive Edition, via SEGA:

About

Experience Sonic like never before!

In search of the missing Chaos Emeralds, Sonic becomes stranded on an ancient island teeming with unusual creatures. Accelerate to new heights and explore vast open zones as you race across the massive Starfall Islands! Battle hordes of powerful enemies with an all-new combat system, uncover the island’s mysteries, and save Sonic’s friends.

Included Content

  • Sonic Frontiers base game
  • “The Final Horizon” story campaign
  • “Sonic’s Birthday Bash” content update
  • “Sights, Sounds, and Speed” content update
  • Digital art book and mini soundtrack
  • Previously released items (Explorer’s Treasure Box, “Monster Hunter” Collaboration Pack, “Sonic Adventure 2” Shoes, and Holiday Cheer Suit)

(Please note that the content of “Explorer’s Treasure Box” can only be validated when you start a New Game.)

While save data from the Switch version can be transferred to the Switch 2 version, there is no upgrade path for existing owners of the Switch version.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer

English



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/sonic-frontiers-definitive-edition-now-available-for-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
